Team Structure 2026

IT 團隊工作分配 IT Team Work Distribution

三個核心崗位，各司其職，協同推動數位轉型

Three core positions, each with a clear role, working together to drive digital transformation

團隊預計於 6 月擴編為 3 位開發工程師。我將工作內容拆解為 3 個崗位，每位成員主要負責其中一個崗位；但考量任務有輕重緩急之分，大家需要相互支援、共同協作，並在日常工作中持續學習彼此的技能。此外，除了各崗位的本職工作外，我們也需共同承擔 2 項額外的支援任務。

The team is set to expand to 3 development engineers in June. I've divided the work into 3 positions, with each member primarily responsible for one. However, given that tasks vary in urgency and priority, everyone will need to support one another, collaborate closely, and continuously learn each other's skills. In addition to each position's core responsibilities, we also share 2 extra support missions.

核心崗位 Core Positions
🏛️
數位行政架構師
Digital Admin Architect
Digital Admin Architect
數位行政架構師
▾

負責維繫企業內部數位運作的核心命脈，橫跨系統開發與流程管理，確保人事、會計與行政作業全面數位化且精準可靠。

Responsible for maintaining the core backbone of internal digital operations, spanning system development and process management to ensure HR, accounting, and administrative workflows are fully digitized and reliable.

  • EIP 平台及行政功能的開發與持續維護（人事、會計模組）Development and ongoing maintenance of the EIP platform and admin functions (HR and accounting modules)
  • 表單流程設計、維護與優化Form workflow design, maintenance, and optimization
  • 資料準確性監控與治理Data accuracy monitoring and governance
  • 前後端全端開發與系統維護Full-stack front-end and back-end development and system maintenance
  • 協助支援跨團隊工作調度Cross-team task support and scheduling
⚙️
數位建設鑄造師
Infrastructure Forge
Infrastructure Forge
數位建設鑄造師
▾

守護數位基礎建設的穩定運行，從伺服器監控到 CI/CD 自動化，確保所有服務在底層紮穩根基，支撐整個技術體系的高可用性。

Safeguarding the stability of digital infrastructure — from server monitoring to CI/CD automation — ensuring all services are built on a solid foundation that supports high availability across the entire tech stack.

  • 伺服器日常運維與監控（CPU、RAM、Disk 使用率追蹤），確保所有服務正常運行Daily server operations and monitoring (CPU, RAM, Disk usage tracking) to ensure all services run smoothly
  • Port 號分配管理、CI/CD 流程建置與故障排除Port number allocation, CI/CD pipeline setup, and troubleshooting
  • GitLab 平台統一管理GitLab platform administration
  • Kubernetes（K8S）技術研究與導入規劃Kubernetes (K8S) research and adoption planning
  • 支援 APP、EIP 開發維護及跨團隊任務協作Supporting APP and EIP development, maintenance, and cross-team collaboration
🔗
數據融合工程師
Data Fusion Architect
Data Fusion Architect
數據融合工程師
▾

整合多元數據來源，打通系統間的資訊壁壘，讓數據真正流動起來——從產線 Dashboard 到 Mobile App，再到跨系統資訊交換中心。

Integrating diverse data sources and breaking down information silos between systems — from production line dashboards to mobile apps and a cross-system information exchange hub.

  • TTRI 資料庫分析，串接廠商資料，開發並維護 TV Wall 及產線工作者所需 DashboardTTRI database analysis, vendor data integration, and development/maintenance of TV Wall and production-line dashboards
  • Mobile App 開發：整合薪資條查詢、Fabric Scanner、電子名片及後續新功能需求Mobile App development: integrating payslip lookup, Fabric Scanner, digital business cards, and future feature requirements
  • 資訊交換中心建置：整合 ERP、EIP 及各 IoT 廠商數據，透過 Shared API / Notification 機制跨系統共享資訊Information Exchange Center: integrating ERP, EIP, and IoT vendor data; sharing information across systems via Shared API and Notification mechanisms
  • 協助支援跨團隊工作調度Cross-team task support and scheduling
額外任務 Extra Missions
Mission 01
ICT 日常工作 Dashboard
ICT Daily Work Dashboard
協助 Chung 開發 ICT 團隊所需的日常工作看板，形式視需求彈性選擇（網頁或手機 App）
Develop a daily work dashboard for Chung's ICT team, with a flexible format chosen based on requirements (web or mobile app)
Mission 02
機聯網數據分析與報表
Machine Network Data Analysis & Reporting
協助 Sang 建立機台聯網數據的分析模型與視覺化報表系統
Build a data analysis model and visualization reporting system for Sang's machine networking data
